page.title: Speedboat Rental Marbella: High-Performance Charters from Puerto Banús

data.meta_description: Book a speedboat rental Marbella from Puerto Banús. 6 passengers, 7m boat, skipper included, from €749/2h. High-performance charters with drinks & snacks.
data.summary: Speedboat rental Marbella offers high-performance charters from Puerto Banús for up to 6 passengers. All rentals include a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and insurance, with prices starting at €749 for 2 hours.
key_facts: 7m speedboat, up to 6 passengers, departs Puerto Banús
Prices from €749 for 2 hours, €2,299 for 8 hours (full day)
Includes licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and 21% IVA
Complimentary water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and snacks
Ideal for short trips to Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, or Marbella coastline
High-performance engine for quick, exhilarating rides
Book via WhatsApp for availability and custom durations
No hidden extras – all taxes and crew included

faq.q: How many passengers can the speedboat hold?
faq.a: The speedboat accommodates up to 6 passengers, plus a licensed skipper. It’s perfect for small groups, couples, or families wanting a fast, intimate charter from Puerto Banús.

faq.q: What is included in the speedboat rental price?
faq.a: The price includes a professional skipper, fuel, insurance, Spanish IVA (21%), water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. There are no extra fees – just show up and enjoy.

faq.q: Can I book the speedboat for a half-day or full day?
faq.a: Yes. You can book for 2 hours (€749), 4 hours, 6 hours, or 8 hours (€2,299). For custom durations or specific timing, contact us via WhatsApp for availability and pricing.

faq.q: Where does the speedboat depart from?
faq.a: All charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella’s famous luxury marina. You can easily reach it by car, taxi, or on foot from the Golden Mile area.

faq.q: What destinations can we visit with the speedboat?
faq.a: Popular spots include Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, and the Marbella coastline. You can also cruise to Cabopino or Estepona, depending on your chosen duration and weather conditions.

faq.q: Is the speedboat suitable for water sports?
faq.a: The speedboat is primarily a high-performance cruising vessel. For water sports like jet skiing, consider our Mangusta 80 charter which includes a jet ski free of charge.

faq.q: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring additional food and drinks. The charter already includes a selection of beverages and snacks, but you can tailor the menu to your preferences.

faq.q: How do I book the speedboat rental?
faq.a: Simply send a message via WhatsApp with your preferred date, time, and duration. We’ll confirm availability and send you a booking link. Payment is secure and straightforward.

data.body_html:
For a fast, exhilarating way to explore the Costa del Sol, a speedboat rental Marbella from Puerto Banús is hard to beat. Our 7-metre speedboat seats up to 6 passengers and comes with a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and all taxes included. Prices start at €749 for 2 hours, making it an affordable option for a short blast along the coast or a full-day adventure. Departing from Puerto Banús, you can reach Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés in minutes, or simply enjoy the thrill of high-performance cruising with the iconic La Concha mountain as your backdrop.

Speedboat Specifications & Capacity

Our speedboat is 7 metres long and can carry up to 6 passengers. It’s powered by a high-performance engine that delivers quick acceleration and a smooth ride, even in light chop. The open layout gives everyone unobstructed views, and there’s ample seating for the whole group. Ideal for couples, small families, or a group of friends wanting a private charter without the size or cost of a larger yacht.

Inclusions – What’s Covered

Every charter includes:

  • Licensed professional skipper
  • Fuel for the entire trip
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava
  • Light snacks
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%) – no hidden extras

You just bring your swimwear and sunscreen. The skipper handles navigation, mooring, and safety, so you can relax and enjoy the ride.

Pricing & Booking Options

Our speedboat rental Marbella is priced clearly:

DurationPrice
2 hours€749
4 hoursOn request
6 hoursOn request
8 hours€2,299

For 4-, 6-, or 8-hour bookings, contact us via WhatsApp for exact pricing and availability. All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and taxes.

Where You Can Go

Departing from Puerto Banús, popular destinations include:

  • Cala del Faro – a secluded cove with crystal-clear water, perfect for a swim stop
  • Cala Cortés – another beautiful bay just east of Marbella
  • Marbella coastline – cruise past the Golden Mile and see the luxury villas from the sea
  • Cabopino – a quieter marina with a lovely sandy beach
  • Estepona – a longer trip for a full-day charter

Your skipper will suggest the best route based on weather and your preferences.

Why Choose a Speedboat Over a Larger Yacht?

Speedboats offer a more dynamic experience – faster acceleration, closer interaction with the water, and lower cost. If you’re after a pure adrenaline rush or a short trip without the formality of a larger vessel, the speedboat is ideal. For larger groups or those wanting luxury amenities (like a flybridge or jet ski), consider our Mangusta 80 charter.

How to Book Your Speedboat Rental Marbella

Booking is simple. Send a WhatsApp message with your preferred date, time, and duration. We’ll check availability and send you a confirmation link. Payment is secure, and you’ll receive all the details you need for a smooth departure from Puerto Banús. Browse all our Marbella boat rentals for more options.

Frequently Asked Questions

How many passengers can the speedboat hold?

The speedboat accommodates up to 6 passengers, plus a licensed skipper. It’s perfect for small groups, couples, or families wanting a fast, intimate charter from Puerto Banús.

What is included in the speedboat rental price?

The price includes a professional skipper, fuel, insurance, Spanish IVA (21%), water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. There are no extra fees – just show up and enjoy.

Can I book the speedboat for a half-day or full day?

Yes. You can book for 2 hours (€749), 4 hours, 6 hours, or 8 hours (€2,299). For custom durations or specific timing, contact us via WhatsApp for availability and pricing.

Where does the speedboat depart from?

All charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella’s famous luxury marina. You can easily reach it by car, taxi, or on foot from the Golden Mile area.

What destinations can we visit with the speedboat?

Popular spots include Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, and the Marbella coastline. You can also cruise to Cabopino or Estepona, depending on your chosen duration and weather conditions.

Is the speedboat suitable for water sports?

The speedboat is primarily a high-performance cruising vessel. For water sports like jet skiing, consider our Mangusta 80 charter which includes a jet ski free of charge.

Can I bring my own food and drinks?

Yes, you are welcome to bring additional food and drinks. The charter already includes a selection of beverages and snacks, but you can tailor the menu to your preferences.

How do I book the speedboat rental?

Simply send a message via WhatsApp with your preferred date, time, and duration. We’ll confirm availability and send you a booking link. Payment is secure and straightforward.
